journeys.title: Build, explain, publish
journeys.user_promise: A runner can be built, understood with receipts, and handed off into grounded publication without head-local shadow truth.
journeys.recommended_action: Keep the journey under routine weekly proof.

journeys.title: Campaign, session, recover, recap

journeys.title: Recover from sync conflict
journeys.user_promise: Conflict and drift remain visible, branchable, and repairable instead of collapsing into silent last-write-wins.
journeys.recommended_action: Keep the journey under routine weekly proof.

journeys.title: Report, cluster, release, notify
journeys.user_promise: A user can report pain, follow honest case state, and only receive a fixed notice once the fix actually reaches their channel.
journeys.recommended_action: Keep the journey under routine weekly proof.

journeys.title: Organize community and close the loop
journeys.user_promise: Organizer and community operation stays on the same account, campaign, and closure spine instead of splintering into side spreadsheets and oral tradition.
